header.name: Sean Luka Girgis
header.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094

intro: I am excited to apply for the Python Integration Developer role at Techgroup America. My experience in Python, PySpark, cloud platforms, and AI-assisted data pipelines aligns closely with your requirements.
body: At CITI, I architected and deployed high-volume Python/PySpark ETL pipelines, integrating AWS S3/Glue/Redshift and real-time streaming to support analytics and forecasting workflows.
I developed GenAI Text-to-SQL agents and automated pipelines using Claude 3 Sonnet and Python, improving efficiency and accuracy of data integration.

I am proficient with FastAPI for modern API integration, CI/CD pipelines, orchestration with Airflow, and building dashboards for actionable insights. My experience in cloud platforms (AWS, GCP) and distributed workflows positions me to deliver production-ready integration solutions.
conclusion: I am eager to bring my expertise in Python, cloud data engineering, and AI-assisted integration to Techgroup America and contribute to building robust, scalable data pipelines.
